blocks.code:
(define sg (rb-state "social_graph.json"))
(define graph (or (get sg "edges") (get sg "graph") (list)))
(define follows (rb-state "follows.json"))
(define relations (or (get follows "follows") (dict)))
(define followers (keys relations))
(define (count-outgoing k) (length (or (get relations k) (list))))
(define pairs (map (lambda (k) (list k (count-outgoing k))) followers))
(define sorted (sort pairs (lambda (a b) (> (nth a 1) (nth b 1)))))
(list (list "total-agents-following" (length followers))
      (list "top-10-followers" (take sorted 10)))
